title: UPST Earnings History & Surprises EPS & Revenue Results
text: Upstart Holdings (UPST) earnings history shows a mixed track record of surprises over recent quarters. Q1 2026 Results: Revenue was $308.2M (beat $303.1M by 1.7%), EPS was $0.30 (missed $0.39 by 22.4%). Q4 2025 Results: Revenue was $296.1M (beat estimates), EPS normalized actual at $0.50. Full Year 2025 Performance: Full-year 2025 revenue reached $1.04 billion (up 64% from 2024) with net income of $54 million and adjusted EBITDA of $230 million at a 22% margin. 2026 Guidance: The company projects a 35% compound annual growth rate over the next three years, with 2026 revenue guidance of $1.4 billion and aims to increase EBITDA margin to 25% by 2028. Forward guidance anticipates earnings of $2.36 per share on $1.4 billion in revenues for the full fiscal year. Historical Performance: Over the last 2 years, UPST beat EPS estimates 63% of the time and beat revenue estimates 63% of the time.
